title: Toddler dies after being struck by taxi
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A toddler was killed...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A toddler was killed after he was struck by a vehicle in Mzamomhle Street, KwaNonqaba, last Friday, 26 September.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - A toddler was killed after he was struck by a vehicle in Mzamomhle Street, KwaNonqaba, last Friday, 26 September."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"The KwaNonqaba Police Station’s spokesperson, Warrant Officer Kappie Kapp, said a minibus taxi hit the little boy, who was just one year and seven months, just before 18:00 that evening."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He was rushed to hospital where he later died from his injuries.","html":"He was rushed to hospital where he later died from his injuries."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The police are investigating a case of culpable homicide. No arrests have been made at this stage.","html":"The police are investigating a case of culpable homicide. No arrests have been made at this stage."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"If you have any information on the incident, contact the investigating officer, Warrant Officer Errol Barnard, on 044 606 5621.","html":"If you have any information on the incident, contact the investigating officer, Warrant Officer Errol Barnard, on 044 606 5621."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Toddler dies after being struck by taxi
